messages.subject: Urgent Report – Violent and Terror-Related Content on Telegram Channel
messages.body:
Dear Telegram Support Team,

I am writing to urgently report a Telegram channel that is publishing extremely disturbing and dangerous content involving graphic violence, torture footage, executions, and bloody scenes that appear to be connected to terrorist organizations and violent extremist activity.

The content shared in this channel includes horrifying videos showing abuse, torture, and violent acts against innocent people. Some of the footage appears to originate from terrorist groups that previously committed crimes against civilians. This material is deeply disturbing, psychologically harmful, and completely unsafe for public access.

What makes the situation even more dangerous is that this channel is publicly accessible. Any child, teenager, or vulnerable person can easily enter and view these traumatic videos without restriction. Exposure to such graphic extremist content can seriously affect health, normalize violence, and spread fear and psychological harm among users.

This channel clearly violates Telegram’s policies regarding violent extremism, terrorism-related material, graphic gore, abuse, and harmful content distribution. I respectfully request an immediate investigation and appropriate action against the channel and its associated accounts to prevent further harm.

Channel Link:

https://t.me/tshteebab

Examples of Violating Videos: 

https://t.me/tshteebab/23

https://t.me/tshteebab/28

Please review this matter as soon as possible for the safety of the community and especially younger users.

Thank you for your attention and support.
